name: Avizor GP Multi 120ml
description: The Ray-Ban Aviator Classic sunglasses are a timeless symbol of style and sophistication. Originally designed for pilots in the 1930s, these iconic sunglasses have become a symbol of elegance and fashion worldwide.

name: Duraplus
description: The Oakley Radar EV Path sports sunglasses are engineered for high-performance athletes and outdoor enthusiasts. Featuring Oakley’s advanced Prizm Lens Technology, these lenses enhance color contrast and detail.

name: Solite
description: Essilor Blue Light Protection lenses are designed to reduce digital eye strain caused by prolonged screen use. With blue light filtration technology, these lenses help reduce eye fatigue.

name: Shades contact lens solution
description: The Ray-Ban Wayfarer is a bold, iconic, and stylish frame that brings a modern twist to the classic aviator. Known for its signature design and durability, it's the perfect everyday accessory.

name: Renu Multi Plus 120ML Lens Solution
description: The Oakley Sutro sunglasses provide a bold, high-performance design, perfect for cyclists and athletes. With a large shield lens, these sunglasses offer excellent visibility and comfort.

name: P2 Penta Plex Lens Solution 120ML
description: The Maui Jim Peahi sunglasses offer premium polarized lenses, excellent for reducing glare and enhancing color in bright environments. Ideal for outdoor activities like hiking and beach trips.

name: Optiano Contact Lens Solution - 60ml
description: Gucci GG0061S sunglasses combine high fashion with classic styling. These luxury sunglasses come with oversized frames and a striking design, perfect for fashion enthusiasts.

name: Avizor Unica Sensitive 100 ml
description: Prada PR 17MV sunglasses offer a sophisticated look with their distinctive square frames and elegant design. Ideal for those seeking both style and functionality.

name: Avizor All Clean Soft 100ml
description: Nike Vaporwing Elite sunglasses are designed for athletes, offering a lightweight and aerodynamic frame. With advanced lens technology, they provide superior clarity and vision during high-intensity activities.

name: OPTI-FREE Puremoist
description: Fossil FOS 6018/S sunglasses offer a trendy design with durable metal frames. These sunglasses are perfect for casual wear with a touch of modern flair.

name: Bella Elite Lens Solution – 150ml
description: Acuvue Oasys 1-Day contact lenses offer all-day comfort and clarity for individuals with active lifestyles. Designed with Hydraglyde Technology, these lenses provide superior moisture and hydration.

name: Biotrue lens solution
description: Acuvue 2 Contact Lenses provide comfort and clarity for those who require daily vision correction. The lenses offer a smooth, hydrating surface for extended comfort.
